  "insight_updates": [
    {"op": "create", "id": "ins_pvalue", "key": "dotted.lowercase.label",
     "text": "P-values represent the probability of observing data as extreme or more extreme than what was observed, *assuming the null hypothesis is true*. This doesn't directly tell us the probability that the null hypothesis itself is true.",
     "evidence": ["att_1", "att_2", "att_3", "att_4", "att_5", "att_6", "att_7", "att_8"],
     "reason": "Learner consistently misinterprets p-values as the probability of the null hypothesis being true, stemming from a misunderstanding of conditional probabilities."}
  ],
  "strategy": {"difficulty": "intermediate", "scaffolding": "medium", "reason": "Accuracy is below 0.85 across multiple attempts with significant completion times (70-100s)."},
  "plan_revision": null,

}
